shots.positivePrompt: T-shirt front view, facing camera, centered, clean studio background. Exact product replication.

shots.positivePrompt: T-shirt side angle, rotated 45 degrees. Show silhouette. Not front view.

shots.positivePrompt: T-shirt flat lay, top-down 90° view, placed on surface. No model, no perspective, no floating.
shots.negativePrompt: mannequin, hanging, standing, perspective angle, people, shadows from standing

shots.positivePrompt: Close-up of t-shirt print or fabric. High detail, sharp focus.

shots.positivePrompt: Professional indoor studio fashion portrait. Model wearing the t-shirt, waist up. Pure white seamless paper backdrop. Standard softbox lighting. Neutral confident pose.
shots.negativePrompt: outdoors, street, coffee bar, cafe, city, windows, messy background, flat lay

shots.positivePrompt: Model wearing the t-shirt sitting casually on a wooden studio apple box. Full body shot. Colored seamless paper backdrop (e.g., pastel grey or blue). High end fashion catalog lighting.
shots.negativePrompt: standing perfectly straight, outdoors, cafe, busy background, close up
shots.hardRules: MODEL MUST BE SEATED ON A BOX IN A PHOTOGRAPHY STUDIO. INDOORS ONLY.

shots.positivePrompt: Model completely facing away from the camera. Showing the PLAIN SOLID COLOR back of the t-shirt. Indoor studio background. Hair tied up or away from the back.
shots.negativePrompt: graphic, print, logo, text, pattern on back, front view, face visible, turning around, outdoors
shots.hardRules: BACK VIEW. STRICTLY NO PRINT, NO GRAPHIC, NO LOGO ON THE BACK. COMPLETELY BLANK FABRIC ON BACK.

shots.positivePrompt: High fashion edgy portrait. Model wearing the t-shirt with a dynamic pose. Hard flash lighting casting a sharp, dark shadow on the white studio wall behind them. Editorial aesthetic.

shots.positivePrompt: Extreme close up crop on the model's torso and neckline wearing the t-shirt. Focus heavily on the fabric weave, collar stitching, and the main graphic. Intimate studio lighting.
shots.negativePrompt: full body, face visible, messy background, outdoors, wide angle

shots.positivePrompt: Close-up of the model's torso twisting, showing how the t-shirt fabric folds and drapes dynamically. Highlighting the material softness.
